query:
-- Seed Legal Professional Bundle components
-- Get the bundle id first
SET @legal_bundle_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_bundle_definitions WHERE bundle_name = 'Legal Professional Bundle' LIMIT 1);

-- Get pricebook item IDs for the components
SET @ucxcel_pro_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_items WHERE product_name = 'UCXcel Professional' AND version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1);
SET @webex_basic_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_items WHERE product_name = 'UCXcel Webex Basic' AND version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1);

INSERT INTO sasboss_bundle_components 
  (bundle_id, pricebook_item_id, component_name, uses_bundled_price, quantity, notes)
VALUES
  (@legal_bundle_id, @ucxcel_pro_id, 'UCXcel Professional', 1, 1, 'Primary service pack - uses bundled_buy price'),
  (@legal_bundle_id, @webex_basic_id, 'UCXcel Webex Basic', 1, 1, 'Included add-on - $0.00 bundled price'),
  (@legal_bundle_id, NULL, 'Dubber Call Recording', 1, 1, 'Included add-on - pricebook item TBC'),
  (@legal_bundle_id, NULL, 'RedCactus Bubble', 1, 1, 'Included add-on - pricebook item TBC');

-- Seed MC- custom bundles (SmileTel-branded bundles with bundled pricing)
INSERT INTO sasboss_bundle_definitions 
  (bundle_name, bundle_type, description, billing_name, notes)
VALUES
  (
    'MC - SmileTel Executive User License',
    'custom_smiletel',
    'SmileTel Managed Communications Executive bundle. Billed as single line. Uses bundled_buy price from pricebook ($21.00/seat).',
    'MC - SmileTel Executive User License',
    'MC = Managed Communications. bundled_buy = $21.00, bundled_sell = $35.00'
  ),
  (
    'MC - SmileTel Premium User License',
    'custom_smiletel',
    'SmileTel Managed Communications Premium bundle. Billed as single line. Uses bundled_buy price from pricebook.',
    'MC - SmileTel Premium User License',
    'MC = Managed Communications. Check bundled_buy in pricebook for current rate.'
  ),
  (
    'MC - SmileTel Basic User License',
    'custom_smiletel',
    'SmileTel Managed Communications Basic bundle. Billed as single line. Uses bundled_buy price from pricebook ($18.00/seat).',
    'MC - SmileTel Basic User License',
    'MC = Managed Communications. bundled_buy = $18.00, bundled_sell = $30.00'
  );
